subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call, and have sent down unto thee that which draweth thee nigh unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و انزلنا لک ما یقربک الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
